privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims have been verified against the setup scripts. The task uses OSCAR EMR (Open Source Clinical Application Resource), a real open-source electronic medical record system based on the OpenOSP project. However, all data (patient Robert Crawley, specialist Alice Wong with Cardiology specialty, and the consultation request with Pending Specialist Appt status and Atrial Fibrillation reason) are synthetically created by the setup_task.sh script. The target status 'Completed' is verified as acceptable by the verifier, which accepts case-insensitive matches of 'completed', 'complete', 'done', 'consult received', 'received', or 'report received'.
